summary: Iter-82 matching pipeline refactor regression test. 21/21 backend pytest cases pass — full coverage of _primary_concern_pass, _payment_pass soft/strict, _availability_pass strict, _urgency_pass strict, score_therapist research_cache bonus folding, rank_therapists decline_history -10pt penalty, RequestCreate model accepts new strict toggles. Frontend IntakeForm verified at source level: PRIORITY_FACTORS reduced from 6 to 3 (modality/experience/identity), all new testids present (insurance-strict-toggle, availability-strict-toggle, urgency-strict-toggle, prior-notes shown for both yes branches), 'How matching works' info box wired on Step 6. Form bootstraps correctly (Step 1 of 8 renders).
action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider exposing a dev/test-mode Turnstile bypass (currently routes/patients.py keeps Turnstile enforced even in test_mode) so future agents can run end-to-end POST /api/requests integration tests. Today, the only viable path is mongo-direct seeding.

OPTIONAL: helpers.py:287 has a confusing chained-and/or for `raw_score` calculation: `(m.get('match_breakdown') or {}).get('research_bonus', 0) and m['match_score'] - (m['match_breakdown']['research_bonus']) or m['match_score']`. When research_bonus == 0 this evaluates to 0 (falsy) → falls through to m['match_score']; works but very hard to read. Suggest rewriting as an explicit if-else for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: matching.py:368 has unreachable `return 0.0` after the `return best` on line 367 — minor dead code in _score_experience.

score_therapist research_bonus is added on top of `total` AFTER the proportional cap-down logic (raw_total > 100 scaling), then capped at 120. This means a deeply-researched therapist can display a score above 100 (up to 120). Confirm this is intentional — UI may need to render that case (or the cap should remain 100 with research bonus replacing some other axis).

_primary_concern_pass uses ONLY the FIRST item of presenting_issues; if a patient lists 3 issues and the first happens to be 'other', the whole list is dropped and no filter applies. Comment notes this; consider taking the first non-'other' item instead (already partially handled — verified).

rank_therapists decline_penalty: when match_score is just above the threshold (e.g. 75) the -10 penalty drops the therapist below the 70 threshold cutoff in `above = [s for s in scored if s['match_score'] >= threshold]` filter (line 732). Intended? If so, the penalty doubles as a soft filter, not just a re-rank.

success_rate.frontend: 100% source-level (form bootstraps; runtime 8-step click-through not exhaustively executed due to time)

test_credentials: Admin: admin123! (X-Admin-Password header). Patient demo email: therapymatch+patient@gmail.com. See /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use in-process objects only; live POST /api/requests blocked by Turnstile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration82_matching_refactor.py is a clean regression suite for the iter-82 matching refactor — runs in <1s, no DB. Treat as part of the standard regression set. For end-to-end POST /api/requests in this preview env, you must seed via mongo (Turnstile is NOT bypassed by /api/admin/intake-rate-limit/test-mode — only rate limits are). The frontend intake is on `/` Landing page, NOT `/get-matched` (that's 404). Step 1 of 8 = therapy type + age; email + state are on a later step. PRIORITY_FACTORS const at IntakeForm.jsx:33 — confirm length stays at 3.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 6 iter-82 changes verified per the brief: (1) score_therapist accepts research_cache and folds bonus inline ✓; (2) _primary_concern_pass always-hard filter ✓; (3) insurance_strict / availability_strict / urgency_strict patient-toggleable hard filters ✓; (4) prior_therapy_notes textarea shown for both yes_helped and yes_not_helped (IntakeForm.jsx:813-814) ✓; (5) 3-toggle commit_bonus = 9 in _deliver_results (helpers.py:446-452, no double-count of research_bonus per line 458 comment) ✓; (6) rank_therapists honours decline_history with -10pt penalty (matching.py:719-720) ✓.
